        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:6]}")

# Check ASCII
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Current state ===")
for i in range(28, 52):
    print(f"Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][35:55]}")
</parameter>

<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let's try rotating and then moving to cover the green bar

action(['DOWN', 'DOWN'])
